title: Your image in the comments
body: [Gravatar](http://site.gravatar.com/ "Go to the Gravatar website") lets you, with a single sign-up, have your *avatar* (icon, custom image, photo, or whatever you want to call it) appear in your comments on blogs, forums, or any type of website or social network that integrates this service. All you have to do is [sign up](http://site.gravatar.com/signup "Sign up for Gravatar") and upload an image (which is automatically cropped to 80x80px) that will be linked to your *email* in any comment you make on a website that supports this system. Registration is very simple, and you can upload as many images as you have *email* addresses.*
